svg.text: Material: ABS or ASA (3D printed) | Envelope: 220W x 4D x 400H mm | Scale noted per view
3. Mid zone (Z=180-220): Two PG7 cable glands
for 1/4" OD silicone flavor tubes. 12.5mm holes.
inlet with fuse holder. 27.4 x 19.8mm cutout.
Two M3 screws at 40mm c-t-c. 25mm interior
clearance. PSU mounts adjacent on interior.
at Z=320-344, X=30-90 for PSU heat dissipation.
6. Soda water path: inlet bulkhead to DIGITEN
flow meter (interior mount) to outlet bulkhead.
No flavor mixing on soda line inside enclosure.
7. Color coding: TAP IN = blue, SODA IN = green,
8. Panel may be integral or removable (TBD).
9. Internal tube routing: hard PE/nylon connects
water bulkheads to valve rack and flow meter.
Silicone transition at PG7 glands for external
